Tests for Bluetooth functionalities including BLE HRM, persistent storage, and local address management.


## Files
- **[test_ble_hrm.c](test_ble_hrm.c.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth Low Energy Heart Rate Monitor (BLE HRM) functionality, including subscription management, permission handling, and event processing.
- **[test_bluetooth_persistent_storage.c](test_bluetooth_persistent_storage.c.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth persistent storage functionality, including BLE and BT Classic pairing operations, analytics collection, and data serialization.
- **[test_bluetooth_persistent_storage_prf.c](test_bluetooth_persistent_storage_prf.c.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth persistent storage functionality, including storing, retrieving, and deleting BLE and BT Classic pairings.
- **[test_local_addr.c](test_local_addr.c.md)**: Tests for Bluetooth local address management, including initialization, pinning, and cycling operations.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Defines and builds tests for Bluetooth persistent storage and related services in the Pebble firmware.
